en:
Godot GUI UPX: This provides a GUI for the embedded open-source software UPX (version 5.0.1). It also, through simple processing, enables UPX to compress Godot-made executable (.exe) files that contain embedded .pck files, which UPX normally cannot compress by default.

Note: When selecting the target exe file, ensure that it does not have an embedded pck and that its pck exists in the same directory. The final result will be an exe with an embedded pck. Please note that exe files exported by Godot versions below 4.5 (excluding 4.5) may not function properly after being processed by this software.

UPX: This is an open-source executable (.exe) compressor. The compressed result remains a directly executable .exe file and does not require manual decompression to run.
zh-CN:
Godot GUI UPX :为内嵌的开源软件 UPX ( 5.0.1 ) 提供GUI界面，并且通过简单处理让UPX可以压缩原本无法压缩的内嵌pck的Godot制作的exe可执行文件。

注意：选择目标exe文件时要确保它没有内嵌pck并且同目录下存在它的pck，最终结果会是个内嵌pck的exe。4.5以下（不包括4.5）版本的Godot导出的exe经过本软件处理后可能无法正常使用，请注意。

UPX （https://github.com/upx/upx）：一款开源 exe 压缩器，压缩结果依旧为 exe 可执行文件，无需手动解压。
